summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FAOD-SECOURS73 new features: Certificate PDF generation, video upload/streaming, and email notifications. All core backend APIs working correctly, certificate functionality fully operational for stagiaires.

minor_issues.issue: Existing chapters don't have video_url support in fiches
minor_issues.impact: Legacy content needs migration for video support

navigation_issues.issue: Difficulty accessing admin chapter editor through UI navigation

passed_tests: Certificate PDF generation endpoint returns valid 89KB PDF
Video upload endpoint accepts MP4/WebM/OGG/MOV files up to 100MB
Video streaming endpoint serves uploaded videos correctly
Certificate banner displays for stagiaires who earned certificate
Certificate modal opens with proper formatting and download button
Email notification system implemented with Resend API
VideoUploader component code properly implemented with URL/Upload tabs
